creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Not sure what 2022-09-24 refers to as I can't see any commit from that date upstream? http://git.mplayerhq.hu/gitweb/mplayer.git/shortlog

I had to drop one patch but given that there's little change between 2022-09 I think the rest should be fine (not runtime tested). While at it make use of upstream's infrastructure instead of hosting our own snapshots.

multimedia/mencoder also compiles in Poudriere
